@@ -942,7 +942,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-3oaig.17","title":"Snapshot tests: mega screen (multi sizes + samples)","description":"Goal:
- Add snapshot coverage for the mega screen across key sizes and samples.

Coverage:
- 80x24 and 120x40 baseline screens.
- At least one sample per diagram family.
- Error case snapshot with diagnostics.

Acceptance:
- Snapshots are deterministic and reviewed via cargo insta review.
- Snapshot naming and grouping is consistent with existing demo tests.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:33:40.962141485Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T16:36:12.714438518Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["mermaid","snapshots","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.17","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:33:40.962141485Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.17","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:36:12.714397771Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.17","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:35:56.413094554Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.17","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:35:59.900868254Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.17","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:36:02.702104723Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.17","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:36:10.199072379Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3oaig.18","title":"E2E test script: mega screen smoke + perf logs","description":"Goal:
- Add an E2E script that drives the mega screen and captures timing/log output.

Coverage:
- Start demo, switch to mega screen, cycle samples, adjust size, toggle overlays.
- Record layout timing output and validate no panics.

Acceptance:
- Script uses existing harness patterns and prints clear step-by-step logs.
- Script is stable in CI and locally (deterministic seed).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:33:48.336997316Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T16:36:30.435296587Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","mermaid","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.18","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:33:48.336997316Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.18","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:36:27.726430179Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.18","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.13","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:36:30.435257784Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.18","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:36:16.195878782Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.18","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:36:18.760875585Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.18","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:36:23.636572294Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3oaig.19","title":"Comparison view integration (A/B layout modes)","description":"Goal:
- Integrate a side-by-side comparison mode for different layout settings so users can see "optimal" choices in context.

Deliverables:
- Toggle to show A/B views (e.g., default vs optimal, compact vs spacious).
- UI labeling + metrics for each side.

Acceptance:
- Comparison mode is optional and disabled by default.
- Works at 120x40+ with clear labels and consistent scaling.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:37:42.924605176Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T16:37:57.296970119Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["layout","mermaid","showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.19","depends_on_id":"bd-12sjj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:37:48.084941337Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.19","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:37:42.924605176Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.19","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:37:53.862314891Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.19","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:37:57.296897412Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-3oaig.2","title":"Interaction model + keymap spec for mega screen","description":"Goal:
- Define the full interaction model: keybindings, modes, and on-screen help.

Deliverables:
- Keymap table covering: sample selection, complexity knobs, layout mode, sizing, zoom/pan, debug overlays, auto-fit, and perf sweep.
- Mode semantics (e.g., edit/inspect/auto-run) and conflict resolution rules.

Considerations:
- Keep bindings consistent with existing showcase conventions.
- Provide both single-step changes and auto-animate modes.

Acceptance:
- Keymap documented in-code and drives help overlay rendering.
- Every interactive knob has a visible state indicator.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:31:28.992591041Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T16:34:12.664873719Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["mermaid","showcase","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.2","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:31:28.992591041Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.2","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:34:12.664811873Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-3oaig.2","title":"Interaction model + keymap spec for mega screen","description":"Goal:
- Define the full interaction model: keybindings, modes, and on-screen help.

Deliverables:
- Keymap table covering: sample selection, complexity knobs, layout mode, sizing, zoom/pan, debug overlays, auto-fit, and perf sweep.
- Mode semantics (e.g., edit/inspect/auto-run) and conflict resolution rules.

Considerations:
- Keep bindings consistent with existing showcase conventions.
- Provide both single-step changes and auto-animate modes.

Acceptance:
- Keymap documented in-code and drives help overlay rendering.
- Every interactive knob has a visible state indicator.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:31:28.992591041Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T16:44:49.419531281Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["mermaid","showcase","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.2","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:31:28.992591041Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.2","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:34:12.664811873Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3oaig.3","title":"Mega screen shell + layout skeleton","description":"Goal:
- Build the base screen composition: viewport, side panels, footer/status, and help overlay regions.

Deliverables:
- Screen struct + state skeleton in ftui-demo-showcase.
- Panel layout that works at 80x24 and 120x40 (minimum sizes).

Considerations:
- Reserve space for metrics + sample metadata without obscuring the diagram.
- Panels should degrade gracefully when height/width are tight.

Acceptance:
- Screen renders with placeholder data and respects existing demo navigation.
- Layout sizes are deterministic and tested with snapshots.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:31:35.484792335Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T16:34:20.249827010Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["mermaid","showcase","ui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:31:35.484792335Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:34:20.249752009Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3oaig.4","title":"Demo integration: route + menu entry + defaults","description":"Goal:
- Wire the mega screen into demo navigation with a dedicated route and sensible defaults.

Deliverables:
- New view enum/route registration and menu entry.
- Default configuration (initial sample, layout mode, panel visibility).

Acceptance:
- Screen is selectable by menu and via FTUI_HARNESS_VIEW env value.
- Defaults load instantly and do not require user input.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:31:40.282040216Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T16:34:23.079399295Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["mermaid","showcase","ui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:31:40.282040216Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:34:23.079362196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3oaig.5","title":"Sample library core: registry + metadata + selection model","description":"Goal:
- Create a central sample registry for the mega screen with rich metadata and selection logic.

Deliverables:
- Sample registry struct(s) with fields: id, title, family, complexity, features, default size, and notes.
- Selection model (by family, complexity, size, and tags).

Considerations:
- Registry should directly reference the feature matrix so coverage is explicit.
- Support both static samples and parameterized generators.

Acceptance:
- Sample selection is deterministic and can be filtered/sorted from UI controls.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:31:44.500275845Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T16:34:15.943591429Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["data","mermaid","showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.5","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:31:44.500275845Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3oaig.5","depends_on_id":"bd-3oaig.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:34:15.943513482Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
